name: Moussaka Aubergines
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out aubergine flesh and dice. (Hint: Try using a grapefruit spoon for this)
2. Dry-fry beef, onion, and garlic for 12 minutes. Add aubergine, tomatoes, and puree.
3. Cover and simmer on low heat for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally. Then remove from heat and cook uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, salt the hollowed-out aubergine shells for 30 minutes, rinse them, then blanch in boiling water for 5 minutes. Drain and pat dry. Spoon the filling into each shell.
5. Melt butter, add flour, cook for 1 minute. Gradually add milk, cooking until thickened. Stir in half the cheese and season with salt and pepper.
6. Top the filling with sauce, bread crumbs, and remaining cheese. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 2 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve with baked potatoes and salad. Garnish with chopped parsley.
